hotels.name: Little Tai Hang
hotels.description_fr:
Situé à Hong Kong, dans le quartier de Causeway Bay, le Little Tai Hang propose des hébergements confortables. Il offre une vue imprenable sur le port Victoria et ses environs verdoyants. Vous séjournerez à seulement 5 minutes à pied de la sortie A1 de la station de métro Tin Hau. Vous pourrez profiter gratuitement d'une connexion Wi-Fi dans l'ensemble de ses locaux.
Le Little Tai Hang est installé à 10 minutes de marche de la zone commerçante de Causeway Bay ainsi qu'à 15 minutes en transports en commun des quartiers Central et Wanchai. L'aéroport international de Hong Kong est quant à lui implanté à 40 km.
Conçues avec un vrai souci du détail, les chambres comprennent une télévision à écran plat avec chaînes internationales et une télévision Apple.
hotels.description_en:
Featuring stunning views of Victoria Harbour with pockets of greens, Little Tai Hang offers cosy accommodation in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong. It is only a 5-minute walk from Exit A1 of Tin Hau MTR Station. Free WiFi is available in all areas.
Little Tai Hang is a 10-minute walk from Causeway Bay shopping area, while Central and Wanchai can be approached within 15 minutes by public transportation. The property is a 40 km away from Hong Kong International Airport.
Designed with a loving devotion to detail, rooms here will provide a flat-screen TV with international channels and Apple TV. Enjoy a cup of tea while looking out at Victoria Harbour or garden, all rooms are equipped with a private bathroom. For guests' comfort, slippers and free toiletries are offered.
hotels.description_es:
El Little Tai Hang ofrece un alojamiento acogedor con unas vistas impresionantes al puerto de Victoria y a zonas verdes en Causeway Bay, Hong Kong, El establecimiento se encuentra a solo 5 minutos a pie de la salida A1 de la estación MTR de Tin Hau. Hay WiFi gratis en todas las instalaciones.
El Little Tai Hang está a 10 minutos a pie de la zona comercial de Causeway Bay, a 15 minutos en transporte público de Central y Wanchai y a 40 km del aeropuerto internacional de Hong Kong.
Las habitaciones, que presentan una decoración en la que se ha cuidado hasta el más mínimo detalle, disponen de TV de pantalla plana con canales internacionales y Apple TV. Los huéspedes podrán disfrutar de una taza de té mientras admiran las vistas al puerto Victoria o al jardín.
hotels.description_pt:
Com vistas deslumbrantes para o Porto de Vitória e as suas zonas verdes, o Little Tai Hang disponibiliza acomodações acolhedoras na área de Causeway Bay, em Hong Kong. Fica apenas a 5 minutos a pé da Saída A1 da Estação MTR de Tin Hau. Está disponível acesso Wi-Fi gratuito em todas as áreas.
O Little Tai Hang fica a 10 minutos a pé da área comercial de Causeway Bay, enquanto as áreas de Central e de Wanchai podem ser alcançadas em 15 minutos através de transportes públicos. A propriedade encontra-se a 40 km do Aeroporto Internacional de Hong Kong.
Os quartos climatizados, concebidos com uma devoção amorosa pelos detalhes, apresentam uma televisão de ecrã plano com canais internacionais e Apple TV.
hotels.description_it:
Situato a Hong Kong, sulla Causeway Bay e a soli 5 minuti di cammino dall'uscita A1 della stazione della MRT di Tin Hau, il Little Tai King offre una vista incantevole sul Victoria Harbour con le sue zone verdeggianti, sistemazioni accoglienti e la connessione WiFi gratuita nell'intero edificio.
Il Little Tai Hang dista 10 minuti di cammino dalla zona dello shopping di Causeway Bay, 15 minuti a piedi dal centro cittadino e dalla zona di Wanchai e 40 km dall'Aeroporto Internazionale di Hong Kong.
Tutte le camere presentano ambienti particolarmente curati nei dettagli, una TV a schermo piatto con canali internazionali e Apple TV, una vista sul Victoria Harbour o sul giardino e un bagno privato con pantofole e set di cortesia.

hotels.name: Hotel Stage
hotels.description_fr:
Located in the heart of Yau Ma Tei and just a 3 minutes’ walk from Jordan subway (MTR) station, Hotel Stage offers guests an ideal base to experience both the dynamics of Kowloon’s commercial district and the cultural riches of surrounding neighbourhoods.
This 97-room hidden gem features a restaurant serving Italian inspired cuisine.
Located on 2/F and 3/F is our versatile and diverse event space which is thoughtfully created for corporate functions and private events. Accommodating up to 200 persons, our meeting venues are equipped with state-of-the-art technology catering to all business and social demands. Parking spaces are also available for the attendees (subject to availability).

hotels.name: Disney Explorers Lodge
hotels.description_fr:
Discover a world of adventure at the Disney Explorers Lodge as you answer the call to explore and immerse in the exotic surroundings, rich cultures, and tasty discoveries that have inspired so many beloved Disney stories. Be awed by the exotic accommodations with rooms facing and furnished according to the four unique tropical climates of Asia, Oceania, South America and Africa Serving international cuisines from the five continents and a large outdoor pool, this hotel perfectly captures the lodge motto of “ad explorare et somniare” (“to explore and dream”).
Meet Disney Friends at Dragon Wind breakfast buffet​
Savor the tastes of ancient wisdom with signature delights from rural and classical Provincial China. Make unforgettable memories when some of your favorite Disney Friends stop by.
